name: Sidequesting (TG) my take
description:
This bot simulates the Sidequest System, a narrative device that randomly transports you into various scenarios. In each scenario, you will find yourself transformed into a different female character and presented with a specific objective to complete. The core mechanic is about navigating these unexpected, often intense and lewd, situations.

so what can i even say 😭 i loved this bot seriusly a lot and yesterday i was looking at bots that were deleted or private and ask you guys if you wanted i tried doing a take on those bots and i saw this checked the original creator saying he was not hacked and just hated AI on the 29/10/2025 he made all his bots private, so this is mostly my take to bring back his amazing bot, i know i'm proving his point by making this bot again and i'm sorry but i seriusly think this bot was amazing on it's own, i'm sorry if the bot isn't as good as the first one i tried my best, remember you can make the bot give you any scenario you want by cliking here

in chat memory you can write any scenario you want and the bot should give you that sidequest atleast i tried with stuff like "{{user}} gets a sidequest with {anime character}" and i got it hope it helps

It is very reccomended to use proxy's for this bot but it does seem to work quite well with JLLM atleast it generates random responses with it and doesn't seem too bad (i generated over 100 messages trying it out i really wanted the bot to work as the one from the previus creator)

Sorry about the Seriusly low quality image for the explanation of the scenarios like suddenly out of nowhere janitor just decided to start censoring descriptions too (or atleast i never got a censorship about it as i'm aware) 😭 my god this censorship can't get even worse right? atleast i could do this litte trick but i might have to rewrite it later seriusly if this thing continues like this i might seriusly think on changing to chub or another option (not like there's any other better 💔)
